name: Infinite World:Dice Team
short_description: This game is a roguelite infinite theme game. In the game, players need to form a team, build characters, use dice to fight, combine skills based on the dice results, get rewards, and become stronger to defeat the final BOSS.
detailed_description:
This game is a roguelite infinite theme game.
In the game, players need to form a team, build characters, use dice to fight, combine skills based on the dice results, get rewards, and become stronger to defeat the final BOSS.
Infinite theme:Contains infinite elements, including: XiuZhen, fantasy, WuXia, science fiction, history, legend, myth and so on.
Strengthening resources: Players can obtain hundreds of species strengthening resources of various levels in the game.
Free character build: Ancestry, Remold, Gong, Skills, Weapons, Armors, Artifacts, use strengthening resources for role build, and build an ideal role.
Use dice to combine skills: Use dice to fight and combine skills based on the results of the dice.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*
*languages with full audio support
